emotional_tone: Trust, clarity, local warmth, non-intimidating. African vibrancy without clichés.

spacing_and_layout.general: Mobile-first. Generous touch targets (min 44px height for touchables).
spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-xl for main containers, rounded-md for inner elements. Avoid sharp brutalism to keep it friendly.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Use flat borders (1px solid #EAE5D9) over heavy box-shadows. Flat design performs better on low-end Androids.
spacing_and_layout.grid: Use 1-column layouts mostly. Bento grid (grid-cols-2) for flash reports (daily cash/stock) to save space.

components.buttons: Large, accessible touch areas (py-4). Use solid #C84B31 for primary actions (e.g., 'Ajouter une vente').
components.cards: Flat #FDFCFB background, 1px #EAE5D9 border. No shadow. Used for Journal de Caisse, Rapports Flash, and Missions.
components.navigation: Mobile Bottom Navigation Bar is MANDATORY for app flow. Sticky top header with solid background (#FAF8F5) and bottom border.
components.forms: Large Shadcn Input fields. Focus state MUST be high contrast: ring-2 ring-[#C84B31] ring-offset-2. Use 'tel' input type for phone number/T-Money.
components.chat_messaging: WhatsApp-like UI. Bubble messages with clear time stamps and read receipts. Needs to feel familiar.
components.charts: Simple bar/line charts using Recharts. Stick to 2 colors max per chart (Primary and Secondary) to avoid cognitive overload.

motion.strategy: Low-end Android compatible. Micro-interactions only. Use simple opacity/transform on buttons. NO heavy scroll animations.

hero_merchant.description: African market trader for landing page hero.

app_logo.description: App logo with earthy terracotta and deep green tones.

warm_texture.description: Warm abstract background texture for headers/hero sections.

testing_attributes.requirement: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Example: data-testid='login-button'

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first UI with a bottom navigation bar for the core app screens.
Ensure 'mobile-first' means responsive design that is optimized for smartphone screens first.
The landing page should highlight 'outil de gestion' (management tool) rather than strict 'fiscal accounting' to build trust with informal merchants.
Use Manrope for headings and Work Sans for body text. Do not use Inter or Roboto.
Design specifically for the Togolese context: incorporate T-Money, Moov Money, and FedaPay visual cues where payment is involved.
Ensure high contrast and clear readability for users with potential low digital literacy.
Keep animations to an absolute minimum for low-end device compatibility.
